_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored) and fill in. Group IDs are Entra object IDs (GUIDs) from each group's Overview page. The values below are pre-filled from the Phase 1 setup — verify them against your tenant before use.
_licenseNote: Use a SkuPartNumber that exists in YOUR tenant (Get-MgSubscribedSku). POWERAPPS_DEV = the free Developer Plan you activated. If it hasn't propagated yet or isn't found, the engine SIMULATES this stage (no error).
_defaultGroupNote: Replace the placeholder GUID with a real 'all staff' group object id, or leave it — the engine skips the all-zeros placeholder automatically.

lifecycle._comment: Only used by the OPTIONAL Watch-Lifecycle.ps1 CSV trigger. The Azure Function trigger does not read this. ONE intake form with an 'Action' first column; use Forms section branching so each action only asks for its own fields.
